violations.text: Cases of meat were observed stored on the floor in the basement walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC stated racks have been ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

The auto-dispenser for quaternary ammonium was in poor repair, not dispensing sanitizer at the proper concentration. Technician has been notified, awaiting part. Staff are manually filling and testing sanitizer until repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
